description:
India Book (IB) II,42 and IV,15 (ח19). Letter from Yosef b. Avraham b. Bundār, in Aden, to Ḥalfon b. Netanel ha-Levi, in India. Dating: Ca. 1134 CE. 

Concerning textiles, musk, and pepper imported from India to Aden, and cinnabar, which was shipped in the opposite direction. (Information from India Book 4.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12 מעדן. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
